task_objective: Add Heroic and Lutris installed-game discovery and search alongside existing Steam support.
tests_added: Launcher filter help and filtering behavior
Heroic installed.json indexing, missing-root handling, and malformed JSON warnings
Lutris pga.db indexing, missing-root handling, and bad-schema warnings
Combined Steam, Heroic, and Lutris indexing and fuzzy search
Steam-only appid lookup against launcher-aware records
README, metadata, and CLI help expectations for multi-launcher support
design_decisions: Use a launcher-neutral InstalledGame record while preserving Steam fields such as appid, installdir, library, and manifest.
Keep exact --app-id lookup Steam-only; Heroic and Lutris IDs are indexed for provenance but ignored by appid lookup.
Use only Python standard library json and sqlite3 for Heroic and Lutris discovery.
Treat missing or malformed Heroic and Lutris metadata as non-fatal and emit warnings only when --debug is enabled.
Sort combined records by launcher and game name for deterministic list and fuzzy-search fixtures.
results: Default list and fuzzy search can combine Steam, Heroic, and Lutris installed-game records.
README and project metadata now describe Steam, Heroic, and Lutris support.
Validation passed during each task commit through the repository pre-commit hook.
